calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-29-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Henry.

Petitioner, Respondent, and the witness were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Petitioner: Anne Dziad appeared with Counsel Fanya Young.

Respondent: Laura Brockwehl appeared with Counsel Chris Norris (SBN# 269013).

John Montez-Evans, witness, was sworn but did not testify.

The Court hears argument by Counsel, and after hearing the argument presented, the Petitioner's request was Denied. The Court stated that this was not the proper forum to re-litigate an underlying dispute that had already been adjudicated, the Small Claims decision, for the reasons set forth on the record.

Mr. Norris is to prepare the order denying the restraining order.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Reset To Dec-29-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
